title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Park Avenue - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Park Avenue - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Digital Marketing Manager with drive and ambition, Park Avenue in Noida is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About Park Avenue:
Park Avenue is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Monitor and improve Net Promoter Score (NPS) and customer satisfaction
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Manage product listings, pricing, and promotions on the platform

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Affiliate Marketing
• Proficiency in Supply Chain

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Professional development and training programs
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Noida, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Park Avenue!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
